---
title: "penguins_test"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(cluster)
registerDoParallel(cores = detectCores())
source(here::here("functions.R"))
set.seed(599)

test_data <- penguins |>
  drop_na() |>
  mutate(bill_len = as.numeric(scale(bill_len)),
         flipper_len = as.numeric(scale(flipper_len)))

test_data |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = bill_len,
             y = flipper_len)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

res <- lapply(1:30, function(i) {
  starting_seed <- 599 + i
  crab_k_across(data = test_data,
                starting_seed = starting_seed,
                formula = ~ bill_len + flipper_len,
                c_vec = c(2:15),
                algorithm = "kmeans") |> 
    mutate(run = i)
})
```
## Save data
```{r}
result <- bind_rows(res)
write.csv(result, 
          file = here::here("analyses/penguins_data/penguins_cRab.csv"))
```
